contact_id.title: Contact Id
contact_id.description: Contact id used to upsert context.

has_issue.title: Has Issue
has_issue.description: True if the user still has an unresolved issue at session end.

new_goal.title: New Goal
new_goal.description: Unfinished user goal to continue later, or empty string if none.

new_style.title: New Style
new_style.description: Communication preference inferred from this session (e.g. concise, detailed, formal).

new_summary.title: New Summary
new_summary.description: Detailed 4-5 sentence summary combining last session summary (when available) with this session: user inputs, assistant recommendations, actions taken, and outcomes.
